title: Under the lenses — halo and ember, warped
prompt: Round 3: mutation lenses over the two survivors. Mark the lenses that reveal something worth keeping.

options.label: Halo X-Ray
options.description: Halo Bloom under the x-ray lens: rings become orbital wireframes.
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="36" ry="14" fill="none" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="3"/><ellipse cx="50" cy="50" rx="14" ry="36" fill="none" stroke="#2dd4bf" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="6" fill="#f59e0b"/></svg>

options.label: Ember Flip
options.description: Ember Strata under the flip lens: the glow sinks below the layers.
